Home/Privacy Policy
Legal

Privacy Policy

Your trust is the foundation of our business. This page explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have. We never sell your personal information — full stop.

Last updated: January 2026.

1. Who We Are

This privacy policy applies to this website ("the Site"), operated by Phoenix AC & Heating Experts ("we," "us," "our"). Our office is located at 18631 N 19th Ave #158, Phoenix, AZ 85027. You can reach us by phone at (602) 773-5522 or by email at info@phoenixacexperts.com.

Phoenix AC & Heating Experts is a contractor referral service. When you contact us, your service request is fulfilled by a pre-screened, family-owned HVAC company that is licensed to perform the actual work in AZ.

2. Information We Collect

We only collect what we need to respond to your service request and improve the Site experience.

Information you provide directly

  • Name, phone number, email address, and ZIP code submitted through our contact or estimate forms.
  • Details about your project, service needs, or property that you choose to share.
  • Any communications you send us by phone, email, or text message.

Information collected automatically

  • Standard log data such as your IP address, browser type, device, referring page, and time of visit.
  • Usage data through cookies and similar technologies (see Cookies section below).

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

  • Respond to your service requests, schedule appointments, and provide estimates.
  • Communicate with you about your project, billing, and follow-up service.
  • Send service reminders, seasonal tune-up notices, and limited promotional offers (you can opt out at any time).
  • Improve the performance, security, and content of the Site.
  • Comply with legal obligations and protect against fraudulent or unlawful activity.

4. How We Share Your Information

We share your information only with the parties needed to fulfill your request. Specifically:

  • Our pre-screened HVAC service partner — so they can dispatch a technician and complete the work you requested.
  • Trusted vendors who help us run our business (for example, hosting providers, scheduling software, payment processors). These vendors are contractually limited to using your information only for the services we hire them to perform.
  • Authorities or courts when required by law, subpoena, or to protect our rights or the safety of others.

We do not sell or rent your personal information to anyone, ever.

5. Cookies & Tracking

The Site uses small text files called cookies to remember your preferences and gather aggregate analytics about how the Site is used. We may also use third-party analytics tools (such as Google Analytics) and advertising tools to help us understand site traffic and reach local homeowners who may benefit from our services. You can disable cookies through your browser settings, though parts of the Site may not function as intended without them.

6. Your Choices & Rights

You have the right to:

  • Request access to or a copy of the personal information we hold about you.
  • Ask us to correct inaccurate information.
  • Ask us to delete your information, subject to recordkeeping obligations.
  • Opt out of marketing communications by clicking "unsubscribe" in any email or replying STOP to a text message.

To exercise these rights, email us at info@phoenixacexperts.com or call (602) 773-5522. We'll respond within a reasonable time frame, typically within 30 days.

7. Data Security

We use industry-standard security measures — including encryption in transit, restricted internal access, and reputable hosting providers — to protect the personal information we hold. No system is perfectly secure, but we work hard to safeguard the trust you place in us.

8. Children's Privacy

The Site is intended for adults. We do not knowingly collect personal information from anyone under 18. If you believe a minor has provided us with information, please contact us so we can delete it.

9. Third-Party Links

The Site may contain links to third-party websites such as manufacturer pages, the Better Business Bureau, or review platforms. Once you leave our Site, this privacy policy no longer applies. We encourage you to review the privacy policy of every site you visit.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or in applicable law. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page will always tell you when the most recent revision was published. Material changes will be communicated more prominently when appropriate.

11. Contact Us

Questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your information? We'd love to hear from you.
